creator: bruth@wmht.org
text:
I retrieved 1.1a3 from their website this afternoon and it compiled clean
out of the box. Works fine on -CURRENT (11/12) and 3.0-RELEASE. Definately
an improvement over .4. However, it does appear to have some math problems
(78% + 43% != 100%). Apparently there is a bug in the 1.0 code. I guess
the choice is revert to .4 or update to 1.1a3.

--
Brian Ruth
WMHT Educational Telecommunications, MIS Department
Phone: 518-537-1700     E-mail: bruth@wmht.org
